# PureSeva

> PureSeva is a community food initiative based in Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India. You gift a meal in your own name, and PureSeva cooks it fresh, serves it, and delivers it with care and dignity to people in need — so no one goes to sleep hungry.

## About

- PureSeva connects compassionate hearts with people in need through the simple act of sharing a meal.
- When you sponsor a meal, PureSeva prepares, serves, and delivers it with care and dignity.
- Meals are served to everyone regardless of caste, faith, language, or means.
- Currently serving Vijayawada, with planned expansion across Andhra Pradesh and Telangana.

## How It Works

1. Choose your gift — pick a meal (breakfast, lunch, or dinner), a date, and a location.
2. PureSeva cooks the meal fresh in community kitchens and serves it with care.
3. The meal is served in your name.

## Meals You Can Gift

- Breakfast (అల్పాహారం) — idli, upma, or pongal with chutney and sambar.
- Lunch (భోజనం) — rice or chapathi with sambar, rasam, curry, and curd.
- Dinner (రాత్రి భోజనం) — rice or chapati with curry, dal, and curd.

## Pages

- Home: https://pureseva.in/
- Gift a Meal: https://pureseva.in/gift
- About Us: https://pureseva.in/about
